mapper.sql: id, admin_user_id, org_name, brand_name, country_code, province_or_state, city, district, address_line, logo_url, cover_image_url, office_environment_images, contact_phone, contact_email, website_url, social_links, founded_year, team_size_range, service_mode, org_intro, org_slogan, verification_status

o.id, o.admin_user_id, o.org_name, o.brand_name, o.country_code, o.province_or_state, o.city, o.district, o.address_line, o.logo_url, o.cover_image_url, o.office_environment_images, o.contact_phone, o.contact_email, o.website_url, o.social_links, o.founded_year, o.team_size_range, o.service_mode, o.org_intro, o.org_slogan, o.verification_status
mapper.select: SELECT FROM agency_org WHERE admin_user_id = #{adminUserId} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM agency_org WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM agency_org o JOIN agency_member_profile m ON m.org_id = o.id WHERE m.user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agency_org( admin_user_id, org_name, brand_name, country_code, province_or_state, city, district, address_line, logo_url, cover_image_url, office_environment_images, contact_phone, contact_email, website_url, social_links, founded_year, team_size_range, service_mode, org_intro, org_slogan, verification_status, status ) VALUES( #{adminUserId}, #{orgName}, #{brandName}, #{countryCode}, #{provinceOrState}, #{city}, #{district}, #{addressLine}, #{logoUrl}, #{coverImageUrl}, #{officeEnvironmentImages}, #{contactPhone}, #{contactEmail}, #{websiteUrl}, #{socialLinks}, #{foundedYear}, #{teamSizeRange}, #{serviceMode}, #{orgIntro}, #{orgSlogan}, 'PENDING', 'ACTIVE' )
mapper.update: UPDATE agency_org SET org_name = #{orgName}, brand_name = #{brandName}, country_code = #{countryCode}, province_or_state = #{provinceOrState}, city = #{city}, district = #{district}, address_line = #{addressLine}, logo_url = #{logoUrl}, cover_image_url = #{coverImageUrl}, office_environment_images = #{officeEnvironmentImages}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, contact_email = #{contactEmail}, website_url = #{websiteUrl}, social_links = #{socialLinks}, founded_year = #{foundedYear}, team_size_range = #{teamSizeRange}, service_mode = #{serviceMode}, org_intro = #{orgIntro}, org_slogan = #{orgSlogan} WHERE id = #{id}
